objective: Own the image/container/Dockerfile mental model; write and build your first Dockerfile
plan: Learn 60m: Codecademy Intro to Docker (first lessons) + Docker Get Started overview
Lab 75m: write a Dockerfile for a tiny Python script; docker build; docker run; break it and rebuild
Drill 45m: explain image vs container vs Dockerfile cold; submit checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Paste the exact instruction line from your Dockerfile that sets the base image.
checkpoint.hint: It is the first instruction in almost every Dockerfile.

objective: Layers and caching — shrink a bloated image with a multi-stage build
plan: Learn 60m: multi-stage builds + best practices docs
Lab 75m: take Day 1 image, measure size, rebuild multi-stage, measure again
Drill 45m: justify every stage out loud; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Which Dockerfile keyword names a build stage (used together with FROM)?

objective: Docker Compose — wire up a two-service local stack
plan: Learn 60m: Codecademy Compose article + Compose quickstart
Lab 75m: app + Redis (or Postgres) via compose.yaml; up, down, logs, exec
Drill 45m: explain what Compose adds over plain docker run; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What is the top-level key in compose.yaml under which every container is defined?
checkpoint.hint: Plural noun, first key you write.

objective: Networking and volumes — persist data across container restarts
plan: Learn 60m: Codecademy networking article + volumes docs
Lab 75m: named volume for your DB service; kill and restart, prove data survived; inspect networks
Drill 45m: bridge vs host network cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What command lists all Docker networks on your machine?
checkpoint.hint: docker <noun> <verb you use for files too>

objective: MILESTONE: containerize job_digest.py with a justified, multi-stage Dockerfile
plan: Learn 30m: review best practices checklist
Lab 105m: full containerization of job_digest.py; .dockerignore; size-optimized; runs clean
Drill 45m: line-by-line justification rehearsal; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Paste the size line for your final image from `docker image ls` (must show MB or GB).
checkpoint.hint: Last column of docker image ls.

objective: Linux essentials for DevOps — filesystem, permissions, processes, pipes
plan: Learn 60m: KodeKloud free 100 Days of DevOps (Linux tasks) or Linux Journey
Lab 75m: 20-command workout in your terminal: find, grep, ps, chmod, pipes, redirects
Drill 45m: permissions math (755, 644) cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What command shows the disk usage of the current directory, summarized and human-readable?

objective: Git beyond add/commit/push — branching, rebase, conflict resolution
plan: Learn 60m: Learn Git Branching (interactive) + rebase vs merge
Lab 75m: create a deliberate merge conflict in a scratch repo and resolve it both ways
Drill 45m: explain rebase vs merge tradeoffs cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What command replays your feature-branch commits on top of main?

objective: Registries and image hygiene — push to Docker Hub as troyxag, scan for vulnerabilities
plan: Learn 60m: registry concepts + image tagging + Docker Scout/trivy basics
Lab 75m: tag and push job-digest to Docker Hub; scan it; read the CVE report
Drill 45m: what is a digest vs a tag, cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Paste the full image reference you pushed (username/repo:tag).
checkpoint.hint: Starts with troyxag/ and ends with :sometag.

objective: SQL drill 1: joins — inner/left/right/full, cold and timed
plan: Learn 45m: Codecademy SQL path joins section
Lab 90m: SQLBolt + PGExercises joins sets, timed, no hints on first pass
Drill 45m: draw the four join Venn diagrams from memory; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Which JOIN returns every row from the left table plus matching rows from the right?

objective: MILESTONE: shell script + cron + container — automate something real end to end
plan: Learn 30m: cron syntax + shell script hygiene (set -euo pipefail)
Lab 105m: write a script that runs your job-digest container and logs output; schedule it with cron
Drill 45m: read your own thaddeus-daily cron line and explain every field; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Write the cron expression for 8:00 AM on weekdays only.
checkpoint.hint: minute hour dom month dow — weekdays are 1-5.

objective: Architecture and Pods — stand up a local kind cluster and run your image on it
plan: Learn 60m: Codecademy Intro to K8s (architecture) + kind quickstart
Lab 75m: kind create cluster; kubectl run your job-digest image; inspect with describe/logs
Drill 45m: name every control-plane component and its job, cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What command creates a local cluster with kind?

objective: Deployments and ReplicaSets — write a Deployment manifest from scratch, no copy-paste
plan: Learn 60m: Deployments concepts doc
Lab 75m: hand-write deployment.yaml for job-digest; apply; scale; roll out a new tag; roll back
Drill 45m: what happens between kubectl apply and a running pod, cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What kubectl command watches the progress of a rollout for deployment/web?

objective: Services and Ingress — expose the app correctly, understand the three Service types
plan: Learn 60m: Services + Ingress concept docs
Lab 75m: ClusterIP then NodePort for your app on kind; install ingress-nginx and route a host
Drill 45m: trace a request from browser to pod, cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: Which Service type opens the same port on every node in the cluster?
checkpoint.hint: The name says exactly what it does.

objective: ConfigMaps and Secrets — inject configuration without hardcoding
plan: Learn 60m: ConfigMap + Secret concept docs
Lab 75m: move your app's env config into a ConfigMap and a Secret; mount both ways (env + volume)
Drill 45m: why Secrets are only base64, and what that implies, cold; checkpoint; log

checkpoint.prompt: What command creates a ConfigMap named app-config from a literal KEY=VALUE?

objective: MILESTONE: full app (app + datastore) deployed on kind with manifests you authored
plan: Learn 30m: review the week's manifests

objective: RBAC — who can do what; create a Role and bind it
plan: Learn 60m: RBAC reference doc
Lab 75m: create a ServiceAccount, a Role (get/list pods only), a RoleBinding; prove denial with kubectl auth can-i
Drill 45m: Role vs ClusterRole cold; checkpoint; log

objective: NetworkPolicies — restrict traffic, then break and fix one live
plan: Learn 60m: NetworkPolicy concept doc
Lab 75m: default-deny policy in a namespace, then allow only app->db; break it; diagnose; fix
Drill 45m: what happens with no NetworkPolicy at all, cold; checkpoint; log

objective: Resource requests/limits and HPA — make the scheduler's job explicit
plan: Learn 60m: resource management + HPA docs

plan: Learn 60m: storage concepts + StatefulSet docs
Lab 75m: convert your datastore to a StatefulSet with a PVC; delete the pod, prove data survives

plan: Lab 135m: end-to-end: helm install your chart, ServiceMonitor scraping it, dashboard live, alert firing on kill
